heading_content_part: Effective date: September 12th 2022Welcome to SHAREit Lite (the "App"), which is provided by Smart Media4U Technology Pte. Ltd. ("we" or "us"). We respect your privacy and comply with applicable data protection and privacy laws. This privacy policy describes how we collects, processes, and protects personal data about you through the App. This Notice also describes your rights in relation to your personal data.

decoder_heading: Effective date
ident_heading: Effective date
heading_content_part: Smart Media4U is the controller of your personal data. If you have any questions about this Notice or how we use your data, our details are provided in the "Contact Us" section below.This Notice may be provided in more than one language. In the event of any conflict, where permitted under local law, this English language version of the Notice shall prevail.
